scripts.content:latam: node --import tsx LatTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx LatTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx LatTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:mexico: node --import tsx MexTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx MexTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx MexTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:china: node --import tsx ChaTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx ChaTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx ChaTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:europe: node --import tsx EuTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx EuTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx EuTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:uk: node --import tsx UKTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx UKTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx UKTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:prepare: npm run content:latam && npm run content:mexico && npm run content:usa && npm run content:japan && npm run content:china && npm run content:europe && npm run content:uk && node scripts/sync-generated-content.mjs
scripts.build:pages: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/prerender.ts && node --import tsx scripts/generate-sitemap.ts && node scripts/prepare-pages.mjs
scripts.verify:release: npm test && npm run e2e:smoke && npm run build:pages:glotm
